steps: Go to https://dashboard.messagebird.com/en/sign-up and create an account (or log in)
Click 'Add access key' to create a new key
Choose 'live' mode for production or 'test' mode for testing
Copy the generated access key and store it securely

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Access Key
credential_fields.description: Your MessageBird REST API access key (live or test)

notes: Test keys are prefixed with 'test_', live keys have no prefix
Free trial credits are available upon sign-up for testing SMS
The key is used in the Authorization header as 'AccessKey <your_key>'
You can create multiple access keys and revoke them individually

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve account balance to verify credentials
